review_title: Highly capable and scalable commission platform
description: We were taking 1-2 weeks to finalize commissions before trying to implement Xactly SimplyComp. CIQ helps us solve for faster calculations (1-2 days turnaround), as well as quick ASC606-compliant JEs for the accounting team.
author: Kevin H.
pros: CaptivateIQ is based on Excel formulas and logic. If you know how to model your commission structure in Excel, you'll feel at home in CaptivateIQ. When you run calculations on a monthly basis, they will take a couple minutes only. Due to the flexibility of the platform, "anything is possible" in terms of accommodating complex plans. The Implementation and CS teams have all been top notch, and willing to help.
cons: The flexibility of the software can be a double-edged sword at times. There are a hundred ways to do everything, and just like a complex excel model, there will be unforeseen challenges that arise from time to time. As a fairly young company with fairly new people handling your implementation, the quality of your implementation may vary from person to person. The "white glove" implementation is worth it unless you have very simple comp plans.

description: My overall experience with CaptivateIQ has been very positive. The platform makes it much easier to manage commissions by automating calculations that would otherwise take significant manual effort. The user interface is intuitive, and once you get familiar with the layout, it becomes very simple to navigate through plans, statements, and payout details. I especially appreciate the transparency CaptivateIQ provides — I can clearly see how each commission amount is calculated, track adjustments, and compare month-over-month performance without needing to request data from finance. Notifications and reminders also help keep payout timelines consistent. Overall, CaptivateIQ has improved accuracy, reduced manual work, and created a fair and visible commission process for everyone involved.
author: Harsh K.
pros: What I liked most about CaptivateIQ is the level of transparency and clarity it brings to the commission process. Being able to see the exact breakdown of how each payout was calculated — including deals, quotas, accelerators, adjustments, and attainment progress — removes uncertainty and eliminates the need to chase finance for updates. The platform also provides real-time visibility, which helps with planning and motivation throughout the month. Notifications and monthly summaries are very helpful, and the interface makes it easy to compare payouts across periods. Overall, CaptivateIQ empowers sales teams with confidence, accuracy, and control over their commission information.
cons: Although CaptivateIQ is a strong platform, there are a few areas that could be improved. The learning curve can be fairly steep in the beginning, especially when trying to understand how plans are structured and how each calculation rule impacts payouts. Sometimes the interface feels a bit complex, and it can take time to locate specific details or historical adjustments. In addition, when commission plans change mid-year, updates aren’t always reflected immediately, which can create temporary confusion. Reports and dashboards could also be more customizable. Overall, while the system works well, simplifying usability and speeding up data updates would make the experience significantly better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I really have no use for it if it isn't going to share what/why we are being paid and explanations as to what we are being paid for.
author: Rita W.
pros: Captivate is easy to login to. It is hard to list a lot of things I like when the information entered is not enough
cons: It may not be a Captivate IQ issue, may be a BD issue. There is no information within Captivate that allows us to understand how we are paid and what we are paid for. It is way to vague
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The most optimal product for anything commissions related.
description: In my opinion Captivate is a perfect compromise between the efficiency of ERP system which is very effective but takes team of consultants to implement a simple change and the flexibility of Excel spreadsheet. It's a perfect tool for commissions team to handle everything commissions related and report on it.
author: Andrzej S.
pros: Mainly how easy it is to implement and learn plus the flexibility it offers. Pair that with speed and efficiency of the system that also helps with planning/simulation and it's honestly the best commissions product I've used in my entire career. The ease of implementing even the most complex plans allows you to keep everything in one place and therefore track spending and performance. It is also extremely easy to use for the end users and when you get stuck you can count on instant support from their team. I would definitely recommend this product.
cons: It's not so much the product's fault but the great flexibility it offers can turn against you if your organisation is not careful with plan design. Sometimes it would be easier to just be able to say 'no, this can't be done in our system' to some of the exotic, one off requests.

description: I have used CapitivateIQ for several years across multiple organizations and it has been consistent with use and ability to track commissions. In general, I have very positive sentiment towards the tool and find that I would recommend it to my colleagues or companies that I work for in the future.
author: Brittany B.
pros: It is very easy to use and the click paths to accomplish what I need in the tool are limited. The tool also gives me access to historical commission information that is very helpful for me to understand how I am performing against my plan.
cons: There aren't any specific cons that come to mind with the tool. It accomplishes everything that I need.

description: Overall experience is a breath of fresh air. It is honestly everything I’ve been looking for when it comes to business tracking.
author: John G.
pros: The difference of using CIQ compared to our prior platform is night and day different. Extremely easy to learn and quite customizable.
cons: There is not much I don’t like about CIQ. It genuinely is a night and day difference from an awful system we previously used.

review_title: Does what it says it will
description: So far so good. I like it based on everything I have written above. It works well with our process and helps me see what my expected payouts will be. No real learning curve
author: Jon F.
pros: I like being able to see my commission numbers easily and understand my payouts including percentages.
cons: it does what it needs so nothing on my side as a rep that I find issues with. I feel that it updates timely and does what It says it will.

author: Nathaniel C.
pros: CaptivateIQ has been a strong addition to our revenue operations process. The platform makes compensation modeling clear and flexible, which helps our sales team understand exactly how their payouts are calculated. The reporting is reliable, the interface is easy to navigate, and changes can be tested without risk. Our finance and sales leaders both appreciate how quickly we can adjust plans as the business evolves. Support has also been responsive and helpful. Overall, CaptivateIQ has improved transparency, reduced manual work, and given us confidence that our compensation plans are accurate and aligned with our goals.
cons: The platform has been effective, but there are a few areas that took time to learn. Initial setup required careful attention to detail and coordination between sales operations and finance. More complex compensation plans sometimes need extra configuration to get the results we expect. While documentation is solid, a few sections could be clearer for new users. Once everything is in place the system runs smoothly, but the early ramp can be slower than expected. These points aside, CaptivateIQ has still been a valuable tool and the ongoing experience has remained positive.

description: Overall its the best commissions/rev platform. I love how easy it is to use and how user friendly it is!
author: Connor M.
pros: I love how easy it is to track my months progress. I know where I can improve in each area to improve my paycheck.
cons: Its been showing a few error codes the last few weeks but its not that big of a deal. I love everything else about it.

review_title: Streamlining Commissions with Ease and Transparency
description: My overall experience with CaptivateIQ has been very positive. The platform is intuitive, reliable, and has significantly streamlined our commission management process. It saves time, reduces errors, and provides both admins and reps with transparency into earnings. While setup for complex plans can take some effort, the benefits far outweigh the initial learning curve.
author: Matthew K.
pros: CaptivateIQ is incredibly intuitive and dramatically reduces the time it takes to manage commissions. The platform gives full visibility into calculations, makes adjustments simple, and eliminates a lot of manual spreadsheet work. Their workflows feel thoughtfully designed, and the transparency it provides to both admins and reps is a major win.
cons: There’s a bit of a learning curve when setting up more complex plans, and some customizations require support or additional time to configure. The platform is powerful, but getting everything tailored exactly the way you want can take some upfront effort.

description: It's fairly new and we keep working out the bugs of accuracies
author: Brandon M.
pros: Gives you an itemized layout of your commision breaddown.
cons: Between approvals and payday there isn't enough time for errors.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sachidananda G.
pros: The information should be effortlessly accessible and easy to reference whenever needed, ensuring users can quickly find and utilize the required details without any difficulty.
cons: By reducing the number of tabs, we can significantly improve the overall look, feel, and clarity of the information presented.

author: Gonzalo W.
pros: Transparency and simple UX. Easy to digest information and ways to also track payment. Forecast is also good.
cons: Could allow for better data visualization as well as more ability to attach documentation that explains compensation.

description: It's a great tool I would highly recommend it for commission calculations.
author: Jackson B.
pros: It's easy to use and you can raise requests directly within the application.
cons: that sometimes it doesn't load quickly and data isn't pulling right away.

review_title: Great product that makes life awesome
author: Juliette C.
pros: Love it Absolutely love this product — it’s reliable, easy to use, and makes life so much easier great
cons: Nothing, I liked it I’ve used this product and can confirm there are no issues — it works perfectly yes
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've only been using it for 3 months, as I've recently joined Ramp, but I am enjoying it.
author: Michael B.
pros: I love the clear and concise display of my payouts with the deal information attached.
cons: I would like to see future *potential payouts* to understand how my performance may effect my next paycheck.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Solid , I really like the specifics details that it shows
author: Robert G.
pros: The details on payouts is good and the metrics are good
cons: Having to log into it each time externally from websites

description: overall have had no issues with the softare
author: Jeffrey R.
pros: How easy it is see the dollar amount break out of each deal
cons: It would be nice to see the current payout for the next month instead of having to click preview

description: Very good -- I was new to this tool coming into my new company a couple years ago and have loved the easy access to my commission data
author: Blake H.
pros: It's simple and intuitive -- super easy to find exactly what you're looking for
cons: My only complaint is sometimes the load times are extensive

author: Janice F.
pros: it updates frequently and I can keep track of what my payout would be
cons: sometimes it isn't accurate the whole time

description: Happy with CaptivateIQ. Works well and provides me with detailed info.
author: Will A.
pros: Easily Readable, sortable, exportable to manage and track commission statements.
cons: In the payout it lists all line items including previous months. I would like to be able to seperate without having to do it my self when exporting.

description: very good and efficient, simple and practic and easy to use
author: eyad D.
pros: simplicity and ease of use and the clarity of information
cons: captivateIQ works just fine and there is nothing I didn't like

author: Jazalyn C.
pros: I like the interface and transparency there is to my information.
cons: Maybe smaller font for the numbers on the main screen so nobody looks behind you ..

author: Monique H.
pros: My pay when it’s accurate and I don’t have to worry
cons: My pay not being correct a lot of times its frustrating

description: Very pleasant product experience. Simple/intuitive to navigate and learn.
author: Maddie M.
pros: I love how easy it is to navigate the tool. Without any training, I'm able to bounce around and view different aspects of the reporting available.
cons: N/A... however maybe it would be beneficial to work with company's revenue teams to build in a paycheck calculator to take other things into consideration like accelerators, addtl kickers, etc.
